logistics.intro: SN Food Distribution manages a robust supply chain to ensure excellence in every delivery.
logistics.p1: Our 200m² warehouse in Bruay-sur-l'Escaut is the heart of our operations, optimized for rapid turnaround.
logistics.p2: With a modern fleet of refrigerated vehicles, we maintain the cold chain and ensure product integrity.
logistics.p3: We deliver across the region within 24 to 48 hours, providing reliable service to all our partners.

values.subtitle: Our Core Values
values.title: Quality, Reliability & Trust
values.intro: At SN Food Distribution, we are committed to excellence in everything we do.
values.quality_desc: We source only the finest authentic products from global suppliers.
values.integrity_desc: Transparency and honesty are at the foundation of our business relationships.
values.commitment_desc: Your success is our priority. We go above and beyond to support your business.

why_sn.subtitle: Why Choose Us
why_sn.title: Why SN Food Distribution?
why_sn.intro: We bridge the gap between authentic global flavors and your local business with excellence.
why_sn.reason1_desc: We ensure quick and reliable delivery services across the region.
why_sn.reason2_desc: Only the finest authentic African and Asian products for our clients.
why_sn.reason3_desc: A reliable partner for restaurants and retailers since our founding.
why_sn.reason4_desc: Competitive wholesale pricing to help your business grow.

hero.text: Based in Bruay-sur-l’Escaut, SN Food Distribution supplies restaurants, specialty grocery stores, and food retailers with a reliable selection of authentic products.

history.title: Company History
history.p1: SN Food Distribution was created to meet the growing demand for African and Asian food products in the Hauts-de-France region.
history.p2: Based in Bruay-sur-l’Escaut, the company has steadily grown by expanding its product range and strengthening its network of international suppliers.
history.p3: Today, SN Food Distribution is a trusted partner for restaurants, specialty grocery stores, and food retailers.

brands.title: All our brands
brands.sub: SN Food Distribution works with a wide range of international brands, bringing you authentic flavors from Africa and Asia. We select only certified partners to ensure the best quality for our clients.

request_info.title: Request information
request_info.text: SN Food Distribution is at your disposal for any need: contact us today for inquiries about our products and services.
